case_title: ANDREW H MEISEL AND ASSOCIATES VS WONG CHEE KWAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,394.45 FILED BY ANDREW H MEISEL AND ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT WONG CHEE KWAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WONG CHEE KWAN
